item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press to break down a new NBC News poll ahead of the nation’s 250 birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and over one-fifth of respondents saying they are only a little or not at all proud to be Americans.

media:content.media:title: Steve Kornacki: America 250 poll shows nation marked by doubt and pessimism
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press to break down a new NBC News poll ahead of the nation’s 250 birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and over one-fifth of respondents saying they are only a little or not at all proud to be Americans.

item.title: Steve Kornacki: America 250 poll shows nation marked by doubt and pessimism

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
item.description: President Donald Trump’s poor approval rating continues to weigh down his party ahead of the midterms — though the GOP has a slim measure of separation from the president, with Democrats holding a 5-point lead in the battle for control of Congress, according to a new national NBC News poll
item.title: Democrats maintain an edge in the fight for Congress as Trump gets poor marks

item.description: Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker joins Sunday TODAY’s Willie Geist to discuss new NBC News polling that shows how Americans feel about President Donald Trump’s job performance amid the war in Iran and ahead of the country’s 250 birthday. “That’s a new low for his second term and of course it does come, as we know, as this war is deeply unpopular, that President Trump has been underwater in his handling of the economy,” Kirsten says.

media:content.media:title: Poll: 57% of Americans Disapprove of Trump’s Job Performance
media:content.media:description: Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker joins Sunday TODAY’s Willie Geist to discuss new NBC News polling that shows how Americans feel about President Donald Trump’s job performance amid the war in Iran and ahead of the country’s 250 birthday. “That’s a new low for his second term and of course it does come, as we know, as this war is deeply unpopular, that President Trump has been underwater in his handling of the economy,” Kirsten says.

item.title: Poll: 57% of Americans Disapprove of Trump’s Job Performance

item.description: After the New York Knicks won Game 5 of the NBA Finals to end their 53-year drought of a championship, fans turned the streets of New York into one big party. NBC’s Marquise Francis reports for Sunday TODAY.

media:content.media:title: How New York Fans Are Celebrating the Knicks' Historic NBA Title
media:content.media:description: After the New York Knicks won Game 5 of the NBA Finals to end their 53-year drought of a championship, fans turned the streets of New York into one big party. NBC’s Marquise Francis reports for Sunday TODAY.

item.title: How New York Fans Are Celebrating the Knicks' Historic NBA Title

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Tim Rohan
item.description: Four years after becoming the first Arab team to reach the World Cup semifinals, Morocco arrives with a roster of European stars — including Real Madrid’s Brahim Diaz and captain Achraf Hakimi, fresh of a Champions League title with Paris-St. Germain.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Morocco world cup on-field action.
media:content.media:description: Ismael Saibari of Morocco celebrates scoring the opening goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match against Morocco on Saturday.

item.title: Morocco’s draw against Brazil showed its potential to be the World Cup’s ultimate dark horse

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Curaçao will make its World Cup debut this month as the smallest nation ever to qualify for the tournament, thanks to its connection to the Netherlands.

media:content.media:description: The Curaçao team huddles during a friendly match against Scotland in Glasgow on Saturday.
The Curaçao team huddles during a friendly match against Scotland in Glasgow on Saturday.
The Curaçao team huddles during a friendly match against Scotland in Glasgow on Saturday.

item.title: The smallest nation ever to qualify for the World Cup didn’t do it alone

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Pochettino, a 54-year-old Argentine, has been on the job for 20 months, but Friday’s game was unquestionably his biggest opportunity to make an impression on a wider fanbase tuning in to watch the U.S. for the first time.

media:content.media:text: USA v Paraguay: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Mauricio Pochettino, head coach of the U.S. men, speaks to the media after the team's victory Friday.

item.title: Coaching the U.S. was a big test for Mauricio Pochettino. Then his World Cup opener went ‘amazing.’

item.dc:creator: Greg Rosenstein
item.description: Folarin Balogun, born in Brooklyn but raised in London, agreed to play his international career with the Americans in 2023. Three years later he opened the World Cup with two goals.

media:content.media:text: USA v Paraguay: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's second goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D match between USA and Paraguay at Los Angeles Stadium on June 12, 2026 in Los Angeles, California.

item.title: Folarin Balogun chose the U.S. over England. It’s already paying off in the World Cup.

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Tim Rohan
item.description: Four years after becoming the first Arab team to reach the World Cup semifinals, Morocco arrives with a roster of European stars — including Real Madrid’s Brahim Diaz and captain Achraf Hakimi, fresh of a Champions League title with Paris-St. Germain.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Morocco world cup on-field action.
media:content.media:description: Ismael Saibari of Morocco celebrates scoring the opening goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match against Morocco on Saturday.

item.title: Morocco’s draw against Brazil showed its potential to be the World Cup’s ultimate dark horse

item.description: La afición de Curazao vivió un momento inolvidable al celebrar el primer gol de su selección en una Copa Mundial de la FIFA. Entre lágrimas, abrazos y euforia, los seguidores festejaron un tanto que ya forma parte de la historia del país.

media:content.media:title: La afición de Curazao explota de alegría con su primer gol mundialista
media:content.media:description: La afición de Curazao vivió un momento inolvidable al celebrar el primer gol de su selección en una Copa Mundial de la FIFA. Entre lágrimas, abrazos y euforia, los seguidores festejaron un tanto que ya forma parte de la historia del país.

item.title: La afición de Curazao explota de alegría con su primer gol mundialista

item.description: El futbolista que milita e el F.C. Zurich se encontró con un balón al frente del marco y no perdonó... Esto es HISTORIA PURA.

media:content.media:title: Livano Comenencia anota el primer gol de Curazao en Mundiales
media:content.media:description: El futbolista que milita e el F.C. Zurich se encontró con un balón al frente del marco y no perdonó... Esto es HISTORIA PURA.

item.title: Livano Comenencia anota el primer gol de Curazao en Mundiales

item.description: El exseleccionado de Estados Unidos, hijo de padres haitianos, comparte la emoción de ver a Haití regresar a una Copa del Mundo por primera vez desde 1974 y explica por qué este momento trasciende el fútbol para todo un país.

media:content.media:title: Jozy Altidore: “Los jugadores de Haití defienden un país” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El exseleccionado de Estados Unidos, hijo de padres haitianos, comparte la emoción de ver a Haití regresar a una Copa del Mundo por primera vez desde 1974 y explica por qué este momento trasciende el fútbol para todo un país.

item.title: Jozy Altidore: “Los jugadores de Haití defienden un país” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: El futbolista del Borussia Dortmund sacó un bello disparo para poner el 1-0 para la selección europea. GOLAZO imperdible.

media:content.media:title: Felix Nmecha anota un golazo para abrir la cuenta de Alemania en contra de Curazao
media:content.media:description: El futbolista del Borussia Dortmund sacó un bello disparo para poner el 1-0 para la selección europea. GOLAZO imperdible.

item.title: Felix Nmecha anota un golazo para abrir la cuenta de Alemania en contra de Curazao

item.description: Julian Nagelsmann celebró el primer gol alemán, pero rápidamente volvió a enfocarse en el partido. Tras intercambiar unas palabras con Manuel Neuer, regresó al banquillo para ajustar detalles tácticos, consciente de que en un Mundial cada detalle cuenta.

media:content.media:title: Nagelsmann celebra el gol, pero no pierde el foco: así reaccionó al 1-0 de Alemania
media:content.media:description: Julian Nagelsmann celebró el primer gol alemán, pero rápidamente volvió a enfocarse en el partido. Tras intercambiar unas palabras con Manuel Neuer, regresó al banquillo para ajustar detalles tácticos, consciente de que en un Mundial cada detalle cuenta.

item.title: Nagelsmann celebra el gol, pero no pierde el foco: así reaccionó al 1-0 de Alemania

item.description: En las populares “Rocky steps” de Filadelfia, miles de aficionados ecuatorianos se reunieron para disfrutar del banderazo de su selección, previo al gran debut mundialista ante Costa de Marfil.

media:content.media:title: ¿Rocky es ecuatoriano? Así fue el impresionante banderazo de Ecuador en Filadelfia
media:content.media:description: En las populares “Rocky steps” de Filadelfia, miles de aficionados ecuatorianos se reunieron para disfrutar del banderazo de su selección, previo al gran debut mundialista ante Costa de Marfil.

item.title: ¿Rocky es ecuatoriano? Así fue el impresionante banderazo de Ecuador en Filadelfia

item.description: El defensor ecuatoriano destaca la unión del grupo, la garra que caracteriza a la Tri y el compromiso de representar con orgullo a millones de ecuatorianos dentro y fuera de su país durante la Copa Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Piero Hincapié: “Esta selección juega con el corazón” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El defensor ecuatoriano destaca la unión del grupo, la garra que caracteriza a la Tri y el compromiso de representar con orgullo a millones de ecuatorianos dentro y fuera de su país durante la Copa Mundial.

item.title: Piero Hincapié: “Esta selección juega con el corazón” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Los caribeños están calentando los motores para su primer partido en una Copa Mundial; Quieren dar la sorpresa ante Alemania, que parte como gran favorito.

media:content.media:title: ¡No te lo pierdas! Curazao está a punto de debutar en el Mundial ante Alemania
media:content.media:description: Los caribeños están calentando los motores para su primer partido en una Copa Mundial; Quieren dar la sorpresa ante Alemania, que parte como gran favorito.

item.title: ¡No te lo pierdas! Curazao está a punto de debutar en el Mundial ante Alemania

item.description: Para Julian Nagelsmann, el estreno mundialista representa el momento de llevar al campo todo lo trabajado durante la preparación. El técnico alemán recordó que en una competición cada detalle cuenta y los errores pueden marcar el destino de una selección.

media:content.media:title: Julian Nagelsmann: “Estamos listos para comenzar nuestro camino en el Mundial”
media:content.media:description: Para Julian Nagelsmann, el estreno mundialista representa el momento de llevar al campo todo lo trabajado durante la preparación. El técnico alemán recordó que en una competición cada detalle cuenta y los errores pueden marcar el destino de una selección.

item.title: Julian Nagelsmann: “Estamos listos para comenzar nuestro camino en el Mundial”

item.description: Curazao llega con gran ánimo para enfrentar a Alemania en su debut mundialista. Quieren dar una gran impresión ante el mundo en Houston.

media:content.media:title: La fiesta caribeña llega al ritmo de Curazao en la Copa Mundial
media:content.media:description: Curazao llega con gran ánimo para enfrentar a Alemania en su debut mundialista. Quieren dar una gran impresión ante el mundo en Houston.

item.title: La fiesta caribeña llega al ritmo de Curazao en la Copa Mundial

item.description: President Trump announced on Saturday that a peace deal with Iran will be signed on Sunday, and that immediately afterward the Strait of Hormuz will be open. The prime minister of Pakistan said a deal was closer “than ever before.” NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian has the latest.

media:content.media:title: U.S.-Iran deal could be finalized within days, Trump and Iranian officials say
media:content.media:description: President Trump announced on Saturday that a peace deal with Iran will be signed on Sunday, and that immediately afterward the Strait of Hormuz will be open. The prime minister of Pakistan said a deal was closer “than ever before.” NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian has the latest.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal could be finalized within days, Trump and Iranian officials say

item.dc:creator: Peter Nicholas
Matt Dixon
Katherine Doyle
item.description: Facing one of the roughest patches of his second term, Trump is devoting outsize energy to giving Washington its biggest facelift in living memory.

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump reacts during a Cabinet meeting at the White House on May 27, 2026.

item.title: Despite war, inflation and sinking polling, Trump takes comfort in giving D.C. a face-lift

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
item.description: British forces intercepted a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker on Sunday morning, its Ministry of Defence said, in the latest effort to disrupt Moscow’s sanctions-evasion network.

media:content.media:text: Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker Intercepted By British Forces In The English Channel
media:content.media:description: Military helicopters are seen Sunday at the Smyrtos vessel outside the harbor in Portland, England.

item.title: U.K. forces intercept a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel

item.dc:creator: Lindsey Leake
item.description: You’re likely familiar with getting your blood pressure taken, the cuff squeezing your arm before generating two numbers.

media:content.media:text: A pair of female hands measure blood pressure
media:content.media:description: A pair of female hands measure blood pressure

item.title: Your blood pressure reading contains a hidden number — and here’s why it matters

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Tim Rohan
item.description: Four years after becoming the first Arab team to reach the World Cup semifinals, Morocco arrives with a roster of European stars — including Real Madrid’s Brahim Diaz and captain Achraf Hakimi, fresh of a Champions League title with Paris-St. Germain.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Morocco world cup on-field action.
media:content.media:description: Ismael Saibari of Morocco celebrates scoring the opening goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match against Morocco on Saturday.

item.title: Morocco’s draw against Brazil showed its potential to be the World Cup’s ultimate dark horse
